remote-signer web UI was not bundled into this binary

This is the placeholder page shipped with source builds. The HTTP API (under /api/v1/) and the operator CLI are unaffected — use remote-signer rule list, remote-signer settings show security, and friends as documented.

To build the web UI from source:

make web    # cd web && npm ci && npm run build
make build  # rebuild the binary with the fresh bundle embedded

Or grab a release build from https://github.com/ivanzzeth/remote-signer/releases — the binaries published there always include a fresh UI bundle.

To disable this catch-all entirely: remote-signer settings set web enabled=false.
